title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vishal Mega Mart

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vishal Mega Mart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!
